scope.summary: Deferred residual hardening collected from the 2026-07-02 wave-A adversarial drift audit so approved-minor gaps are not forgotten (operator directive: defer uncorrelated gaps to a future MT in the same WP). Items: (1) MT-004: auto-scroll current match below find-bar occlusion (RISK-004); replace_all over-1000 cap or off-thread run plus progress indicator; kittest typing into find TextEdit. (2) MT-006: outline raw-click navigation kittest; fold-active navigation landing-row test. (3) MT-013: overflow popup 2-frame kittest; Bold toolbar button click kittest; fix stale offset-0 backspace comment in input_handler.rs. (4) MT-016: fix code-block slash-menu description promising a nonexistent language prompt (or implement code-language and table row/col prompts); assert slash char remains after Escape. (5) MT-018: keystroke-driven find-input kittest; replace-one/replace-all click kittests; scrolled-tall-doc highlight integration test. (6) MT-098: live-harness type-and-click send proof observing EndpointMissing; align probed route naming with real backend route conventions. (7) MT-100: workspace-folder resolution residual (process cwd vs chosen folder) tracked to the real /terminal route. (8) MT-102: real-GPU worksurface screenshot captured and visually inspected (PT-102-B). (9) MT-105: decide/implement hard total-runtime cap for forever-ticking operations (deadline currently = progress-gap only). (10) MT-106: surface Suspected/no-baseline child stalls as diagnostics events; make registration-time liveness baseline mandatory via register_file_child. (11) SYSTEMIC: screenshot proof harness must emit an explicit typed DEFERRED/BLOCKED marker instead of silently passing when no wgpu adapter exists, so GREEN never implies pixels on headless hosts. (12) MT-004/MT-009 dep governance nit: Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock rode outside allowed_paths for sanctioned deps - record disposition.

acceptance_criteria.text: Each numbered residual item is either implemented with a runtime-proven test, or explicitly re-deferred with a typed reason recorded in this contract.
Systemic screenshot-harness item (11) is mandatory: headless runs produce a typed deferred marker artifact, not silent GREEN.
No regression: full handshake-native suite green after changes.

proof_targets: per-item targeted tests enumerated at claim time

target_entries: find/replace behavior notes if thresholds change
diagnostics stall-watchdog semantics if cap added

risks: Residual bucket becomes a dumping ground that never closes.
Polish edits regress proven wave-A SOUND behavior.
Screenshot-harness change could destabilize the existing PNG proof suite.
minimum_controls: Every item has a disposition (IMPLEMENTED or RE_DEFERRED-with-reason) before READY_FOR_VALIDATION.
Harness change keeps existing GPU-host behavior identical; only the headless path gains the typed marker.
